config.script:
'/////////////////////////////////////////////////////// '///////// GOTOWE WRITERY : //////////////////////////// '///////// ZPA '///////// ZFA '///////// ZUA '///////// ZWUA '///////// ZZA '///////// RCA '///////// RNA '///////// RZA '///////// RSA '///////// DRA
#macro PLATNIK_SECTION_BEGIN(_nr_) \ with zus_doc.DANE_##_nr_ \ .WriteHeader
#define PLATNIK_SECTION_END \ .WriteFooter \ end with
#macro PLATNIK_DOC_BEGIN(_name_) \ set zus_doc = w.new##_name_ \ zus_doc.WriteHeader
#define PLATNIK_DOC_END \ zus_doc.WriteFooter \ set zus_doc = nothing
sub TestEqual(byval a, byval b) if not a = b then MsgBox "DIFFERENT :[" + CStr(a) + "]!=[" + CStr(b) + "]" end if end sub
''''''''''''''''''' Funkcje testujące '''''''''''''''''''''''''
function WriteTestZPA(byval filename)
dim stream : set stream = doc_.createstreamobj
dim w : set w = CreatePlatnikWriter(stream) w.WriteHeader
dim zus_doc
PLATNIK_DOC_BEGIN(ZPA)
PLATNIK_SECTION_BEGIN(I) .Zgloszenie = true .ZgleszenieZmianyDanych = "1" .DataNadania = Now .NrNalepki = "" PLATNIK_SECTION_END
PLATNIK_SECTION_BEGIN(II) .NIP = "526-030-56-44" .REGON = "234121423423" .NazwaSkrocona = "FIRMAXXX" .ID_SYSTEMOWY = "" ' zerowane przez writer .NR_WER_DANYCH_ID = "" ' zerowane przez writer .POZIOM_UFNOSCI_ID = "" ' zerowane przez writer PLATNIK_SECTION_END

PLATNIK_SECTION_BEGIN(IV) .NumerRachunku = "1235243534" .CzyMaInneRachunki = false PLATNIK_SECTION_END
PLATNIK_SECTION_BEGIN(V) .CzyPracaChroniona = false .DataOtrzymaniaStatusuZPCh = now .DataUtratyStatusuZPCh = now .CzyAdresInnyNizSiedziba = false PLATNIK_SECTION_END

end function

.SumaWszystkiego = 124.5 PLATNIK_SECTION_END

PLATNIK_SECTION_BEGIN(X) .KwotaDoplatyNaSpoleczne = 28.9 .KwotaDoplatyNaZdrowotne = 28.9 .KwotaDoplatyNaFPiFGSP = 28.9 .SumaWszystkiego = .curKwotaDoplatyNaSpoleczne + _ .curKwotaDoplatyNaZdrowotne + _ .curKwotaDoplatyNaFPiFGSP PLATNIK_SECTION_END

function TestPlatnikWriter
TestEqual NumberToCharNum(0,3), "000" TestEqual NumberToCharNum(3,3), "003" TestEqual NumberToCharNum(43,3), "043" TestEqual NumberToCharNum(153,3), "153"
WriteTestZPA("c:\\test_kdu\\zpa.kdu") WriteTestZFA("c:\\test_kdu\\zfa.kdu") WriteTestZUA("c:\\test_kdu\\zua.kdu") WriteTestZWUA("c:\\test_kdu\\zwua.kdu") WriteTestZZA("c:\\test_kdu\\zza.kdu") WriteTestRCA("c:\\test_kdu\\rca.kdu") WriteTestRNA("c:\\test_kdu\\rna.kdu") WriteTestRZA("c:\\test_kdu\\rza.kdu") WriteTestRSA("c:\\test_kdu\\rsa.kdu") WriteTestDRA("c:\\test_kdu\\dra.kdu") MsgBox "ok!"
end function
'''''''''''' makra '''''''''''''''''''''
'''''''' Klasa mająca nazwę i referencję do writer'a'''''' #macro PLATNIK_NAMED_WRITER_MEMBERS(_name_) \ private m_Name \ private m_Writer \ \ public sub Create(byref writer) \ m_Name = "_name_" \ set m_Writer = writer \ OnCreate \ end sub \
''''''''' Klasa odpowiedzialna za daną sekcję, np. <DAIP> #macro PLATNIK_CHILD_CLASS(_classtype_,_section_nr_,_tag_name_) \ class CPlatnik##_classtype_##_DANE##_section_nr_ \ PLATNIK_NAMED_WRITER_MEMBERS(_tag_name_) \ \ public sub OnCreate \ end sub \ \ public sub WriteHeader \ m_Writer.WriteTag(m_Name) \ end sub \ \ public sub WriteFooter \ m_Writer.WriteTagEnd(m_Name) \ end sub
#macro PLATNIK_INIT_CHILD(_class_type_,_name_nr_) \ set DANE_##_name_nr_ = new CPlatnik##_class_type_##_DANE##_name_nr_ \ DANE_##_name_nr_.Create(m_Writer)
#macro PLATNIK_DOCUMENT_CLASS(_name_) \ class CPlatnik##_name_ \ \ PLATNIK_NAMED_WRITER_MEMBERS(_name_) \ PLATNIK_HEAD_FOOT_MEMBERS
' składowe do zapisywania nagłówka / stopki dokumentu #define PLATNIK_HEAD_FOOT_MEMBERS \ public sub WriteHeader \ m_Writer.WriteDocHeader(m_Name) \ end sub \ \ public sub WriteFooter \ m_Writer.WriteDocFooter(m_Name) \ end sub \
''''''''' typy pól ''''''''''''
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_BOOL(_name_) \ public b##_name_ \ public property let _name_(value) \ m_Writer.WriteLine(BoolToZUS(value)) \ b##_name_ = value \ end property
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_STRING(_name_,_width_) \ public str##_name_ \ public property let _name_(value) \ m_Writer.WriteLine(AdjustToSize(value,_width_)) \ str##_name_ = CStr(value) \ end property
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_FILLED_STRING(_name_,_width_,_fillchar_) \ public property let _name_(value) \ m_Writer.WriteLine(string(_width_,_fillchar_)) \ end property
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_CHAR(_name_) \ public str##_name_ \ public property let _name_(value) \ m_Writer.WriteLine(AdjustToSize(value,1)) \ str##_name_ = value \ end property
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_DATE(_name_) \ public property let _name_(value) \ if IsDate(CStr(value)) then \ m_Writer.WriteLine(DatetoDDMMRRRR(value)) \ else \ m_Writer.WriteLine(string(8," ")) \ end if \ end property
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_NIP(_name_) \ public property let _name_(value) \ m_Writer.WriteNIP(value) \ end property
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_REGON(_name_) \ public property let _name_(value) \ m_Writer.WriteRegon(value) \ end property
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_PESEL(_name_) \ public property let _name_(value) \ m_Writer.WriteLine(AdjustToSize(value,11)) \ end property
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_KOD_POCZTOWY(_name_) \ public property let _name_(value) \ m_Writer.WriteLine(AdjustToSize(NIPtoZUSNIP(value),5)) \ end property
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_ATTACHMENT_COUNT(_name_) \ public property let _name_(value) \ m_Writer.WriteLine(AdjustToSize(NumberToCharNum(value,3),3)) \ end property
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_NUMBER(_name_,_width_) \ public n##_name_ \ public property let _name_(value) \ m_Writer.WriteLine(AdjustToSize(NumberToCharNum(value,_width_),_width_)) \ n##_name_ = value \ end property
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_OKRES(_name_) \ public function Set##_name_ (byval value1,byval value2) \ \ dim d1 : d1 = string(8," ") \ if IsDate(CStr(value1)) then \ d1 = DatetoDDMMRRRR(value1) \ end if \ \ dim d2 : d2 = string(8," ") \ if IsDate(CStr(value2)) then \ d2 = DatetoDDMMRRRR(value2) \ end if \ \ m_Writer.WriteLine(d1 + d2) \ end function
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_FRACTION(_name_) \ public _name_##1 \ public _name_##2 \ public function set##_name_(value1,value2) \ m_Writer.WriteLine(AdjustToSizeNum(CStr(value1),3) + AdjustToSizeNum(CStr(value2),3)) \ _name_##1 = value1 \ _name_##2 = value2 \ end function
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_CURRENCY(_name_,_width_) \ public cur##_name_ \ public property let _name_(value) \ m_Writer.WriteLine(AdjustToSizeNum(CurtoStrNoDot(value),_width_)) \ if (isNumeric(value)) then \ cur##_name_ = CCur(value) \ else \ cur##_name_ = CCur(0) \ end if \ end property
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_CURRENCY_EMPTY(_name_,_width_) \ public cur##_name_ \ public property let _name_(value) \ if (CStr(value)="") then \ m_Writer.WriteLine(AdjustToSize(value,_width_)) \ cur##_name_ = CCur(0) \ else \ m_Writer.WriteLine(AdjustToSizeNum(CurtoStrNoDot(value),_width_)) \ if (isNumeric(value)) then \ cur##_name_ = CCur(value) \ else \ cur##_name_ = CCur(0) \ end if \ end if \ end property
#macro PLATNIK_NEW_ZUS_DOC_WRITER(_name_) \ public function new##_name_ \ set new##_name_ = new CPlatnik##_name_ \ new##_name_.Create(me) \ end function
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_STATIC(_name_,_value_) \ public property let _name_(value) \ m_Writer.WriteLine(_value_) \ end property
#macro PLATNIK_ITEM_DDMM(_name_) \ public d##_name_ \ public property let _name_(value) \ if IsDate(CStr(value)) then \ m_Writer.WriteLine(DatetoDDMM(value)) \ else \ m_Writer.WriteLine(string(4," ")) \ end if \ d##_name_ = value \ end property

'''''''''''' Klasa do zapisywania danych do Płatnika '''''''''''''''''
class CPlatnikWriter
private m_Stream ' strumień wyjściowy
' wpisuje linijkę public function WriteLine(byval what) m_Stream.write what + vbCRLF end function
' nagłówek całego pliku KDU public function WriteHeader PPZUS_fileheader(me) end function
' stopka całego pliku KDU public function WriteFooter PPZUS_filefooter(me) end function
' nagłówek pojedynczego dokumentu płatnika public function WriteDocHeader(byval doc_type_name) PPZUS_docheader "ZUS" + doc_type_name,me end function
' stopka pojedynczego dokumentu płatnika public function WriteDocFooter(byval doc_type_name) PPZUS_docfooter "ZUS" + doc_type_name,me end function
' NIP z myślnikami na ZUS'owski public function WriteNIP(byval nip) WriteLine(AdjustToSize(NIPtoZUSNIP(nip),10)) end function
' Regon public function WriteRegon(byval value) WriteLine(AdjustToSize(value,14)) end function
public function WriteTag(byval name) WriteLine( "<" + name + ">") end function
public function WriteTagEnd(byval name) WriteTag("/" + name) end function
' parametry przy tworzeniu public function Create(byref streamobj) set m_Stream = streamobj end function
public function SetFFF(byval value1,byval value2)
dim d1 : d1 = string(8," ") if IsDate(CStr(value1)) then d1 = DatetoDDMMRRRR(value1) end if
dim d2 : d2 = string(8," ") if IsDate(CStr(value2)) then d2 = DatetoDDMMRRRR(value2) end if
m_Writer.WriteLine(d1 + d2)
end function
' poszczególne rodzaje dokumentów : PLATNIK_NEW_ZUS_DOC_WRITER(ZPA) PLATNIK_NEW_ZUS_DOC_WRITER(ZFA) PLATNIK_NEW_ZUS_DOC_WRITER(ZUA) PLATNIK_NEW_ZUS_DOC_WRITER(ZWUA) PLATNIK_NEW_ZUS_DOC_WRITER(ZZA) PLATNIK_NEW_ZUS_DOC_WRITER(RCA) PLATNIK_NEW_ZUS_DOC_WRITER(RNA) PLATNIK_NEW_ZUS_DOC_WRITER(RZA) PLATNIK_NEW_ZUS_DOC_WRITER(RSA) PLATNIK_NEW_ZUS_DOC_WRITER(DRA)
end class
'''''''''''' Tworzy nową klasę ''''''''''''''''''''
function CreatePlatnikWriter(byref stream) set CreatePlatnikWriter = new CPlatnikWriter CreatePlatnikWriter.Create(stream) end function
''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''
'''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''' ''''' FUNKCJE ZE STAREGO EKSPORTU '''''''' ''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''
'wspolne dla wszystkich dokumentow sub PPZUS_fileheader(byref txs) txs.WriteLine("<!DOCTYPE KEDU PUBLIC '-//ZUS//DTD KEDU 1.0//PL' [") txs.WriteLine("<!ENTITY wersja '001.200'>") txs.WriteLine("<!ENTITY strona.kodowa 'ISO 8859-2'>") txs.WriteLine("]>") txs.WriteLine("<KEDU>") txs.WriteLine("<naglowek.KEDU>") txs.WriteLine(Space(139)) txs.WriteLine("</naglowek.KEDU>") end sub
sub PPZUS_filefooter(byref txs) txs.WriteLine("<stopka.KEDU>") txs.WriteLine("</stopka.KEDU>") txs.WriteLine("</KEDU>") end sub
sub PPZUS_docheader(doctype,byref txs) txs.WriteLine("<"+doctype+".DP>") txs.WriteLine("<naglowek.DP>") txs.WriteLine(Space(245)) txs.WriteLine("</naglowek.DP>") txs.WriteLine("<"+doctype+">") end sub
sub PPZUS_docfooter(doctype,byref txs) txs.WriteLine("</"+doctype+">") txs.WriteLine("<stopka.DP>") txs.WriteLine("</stopka.DP>") txs.WriteLine("</"+doctype+".DP>") end sub
function NIPtoZUSNIP(szNIP) dim i dim szZUSNIP for i=1 to Len(szNIP) if Mid(szNIP,i,1) >= "0" and Mid(szNIP,i,1) <= "9" then szZUSNIP = szZUSNIP + Mid(szNIP,i,1) end if next NIPtoZUSNIP = szZUSNIP end function
'' Używam zawsze AdjustToSizePol zamiast tylko AdjustToSize, '' bo to szybciej się robi i pewniej, a na prędkości wykonywania '' i tak nikomu nie będzie zależało
function AdjustToSize(szStr,nSize) AdjustToSize = xxAdjustToSizePol(szStr,nSize) end function
function xxAdjustToSizePol(szStr,nSize) xxAdjustToSizePol = xxAdjustToSize(ConvertPol2ZUS(szStr),nSize) end function
function xxAdjustToSize(szStr,nSize) if (UCase(szStr) = "<BRAK ULICY>") then szStr = "" end if
szStr = replace(szStr, "<", "") szStr = replace(szStr, ">", "")
if Len(szStr) > nSize then xxAdjustToSize = Left(szStr,nSize) else xxAdjustToSize = szStr + Space(nSize-Len(szStr)) end if end function
''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''
function ConvertPol2ZUS(str) dim res, i, l, c res = "" l = len(str) for i = 1 to l c = mid(str, i, 1) select case c case "ą", "Ą" res = res + "ˇ" case "ć", "Ć" res = res + "Ć" case "ę", "Ę" res = res + "Ę" case "ł", "Ł" res = res + "Ł" case "ń", "Ń" res = res + "Ń" case "ó", "Ó" res = res + "Ó" case "ś", "Ś" res = res + "¦" case "ź", "Ź" res = res + "¬" case "ż", "Ż" res = res + "Ż" case else res = res + ucase(c) end select next ConvertPol2ZUS = res end function
function DatetoDDMMRRRR(Data) if not isempty(Data) then DatetoDDMMRRRR = Mid(CStr(Day(Data) + 100),2) + Mid(CStr(Month(Data) + 100),2) + CStr(Year(Data)) else DatetoDDMMRRRR = Space(8) end if end function
function DatetoDDMM(data) if not isempty(data) then DatetoDDMM = Mid(CStr(Day(Data) + 100),2) + Mid(CStr(Month(Data) + 100),2) else DatetoDDMM = Space(4) end if end function
function BoolToZUS(bBool) if bBool then BoolToZUS = "X" else BoolToZUS = " " end if end function
function CurtoStrNoDot(Kwota) if CStr(Kwota) = "" then CurtoStrNoDot = "" else CurtoStrNoDot = CStr(CLng(Kwota*100)) end if end function
function AdjustToSizeNum(szStr,nSize) if Len(szStr) > nSize then AdjustToSizeNum = Left(szStr,nSize) else AdjustToSizeNum = String(nSize-Len(szStr),"0") + szStr end if end function
function NumberToCharNum(byval number,byval width)
dim result : result = CStr("")
dim a : a = number dim i
for i = 1 to width result = CStr(a mod 10) + result a = a \ 10 next
NumberToCharNum = result
end function
